name: omi
title: Omi
description: Save and search your omi resources from Raycast.
author: omi

preferences.name: appUrl
preferences.title: Omi App URL
preferences.description: URL of the omi web app (e.g. https://app.omi.ac, or http://localhost:3000 for local dev).

preferences.name: convexSiteUrl
preferences.title: Omi API URL
preferences.description: URL of the omi Convex site. Most users should leave this as the default.

commands.name: search-resources
commands.title: Search Resources
commands.subtitle: Omi
commands.description: Browse your saved resources in a visual grid.

commands.name: save-url
commands.title: Save URL
commands.subtitle: Omi
commands.description: Save a URL to your omi workspace.

commands.name: save-tab
commands.title: Save Current Tab
commands.subtitle: Omi
commands.description: Save the active browser tab to your omi workspace.

commands.name: save-note
commands.title: Save Note
commands.subtitle: Omi
commands.description: Quickly save a note to your omi workspace.

commands.name: connect
commands.title: Connect Omi
commands.subtitle: Omi
commands.description: Link Raycast to your omi account.
